mapper.select: SELECT DATE(CONVERT_TZ(created_at, '+00:00', '+08:00')) AS stat_date, SUM(CASE WHEN action = 'learn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS words_learned, SUM(CASE WHEN action = 'review' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS words_reviewed, SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'correct' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correct_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(COALESCE(duration_ms, 0)) AS total_ms FROM study_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{to} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date ASC
